title: pouteria obtusifolia var. parvifolia
intro: Pouteria obtusifolia var. parvifolia, also known as the Dwarf Pouteria or Otaheite Almond, is a plant species in the family Sapotaceae, native to the Pacific Islands. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that may help alleviate various health issues. The health benefits associated with Pouteria obtusifolia var. parvifolia include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
